description: Document of divorce settlement between Karīma bt. Yosef (represented by Yaʿaqov b. Avraham al-Qābisī) and Salmān b. ʿAlī / Shelomo b. ʿEli. Signed by ʿEli b. ʿAmram ha-Levi, head of the Jerusalemite congregation in Fustat, and Avraham b. David [Ibn Sighmār], and dated Friday, 27 Kislev 1361/November 1049. The signatures were delayed until ~21 Ṭevet (December 1049).
